rules: read-only — reads captured network requests, mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli network` via the bundled npx wrapper
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: network.json.
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page to read real network activity; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
